title: Capstone Partners Announces Industry and Practice Group Heads
text: BOSTON , July 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Capstone Partners ("Capstone" or "the firm"), a leading middle market investment banking firm, is pleased to announce the appointment of several leadership positions across the firm. Following the firm's merger with Huntington National Bank earlier this year, the appointments are being rolled-out to support growth and acquisitions, and ensure the firm remains navigational as it continues to expand in both scale and scope.

title: HUNTINGTON BANCSHARES INCORPORATED INCREASES ITS PRIME RATE TO 5.5 PERCENT
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , July 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) announced that its prime rate is increasing from 4.75 percent to 5.5 percent, effective July 28, 2022. The rate was last changed on June 16, 2022, when Huntington increased its prime rate from 4 percent to 4.75 percent.

title: Huntington Bancshares: An Enduring Company With A Strong Dividend
text: HBAN has roots going back to the founding of our country. Steady revenue growth, controlled expenses, and strong profitability have helped the company grow into a regional banking powerhouse.

title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (HBAN) CEO Steve Steinour on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 21, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Tim Sedabres - Director, Investor Relations Steve Steinour - Chairman, President & Chief Executive Officer Zach Wasserman - Chief Financial Officer Rich Pohle - Chief Credit Officer Conference Call Participants John Pancari - Evercore Betsy Graseck - Morgan Stanley Steven Alexopoulos - JPMorgan Ken Usdin - Jefferies Ebrahim Poonawala - Bank of America Jon Arfstrom - RBC Capital Markets David Long - Raymond James Erika Najarian - UBS Scott Siefers - Piper Sandler David Konrad - KBW Operator Greetings and welcome to the Huntington Bancshares Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Huntington (HBAN) Q2 Earnings Beat on Revenue Growth, Loans Up
text: Net interest income growth and lower expenses drive Huntington's (HBAN) Q2 earnings. Improved credit metrics are encouraging.

title: HUNTINGTON BANCSHARES INCORPORATED REPORTS 2022 SECOND-QUARTER EARNINGS
text: Delivers Record Net Income and Achievement of Medium-Term Financial Targets Net Interest Income Increased 10% Sequentially and Continued Expense Reductions Drive Record PPNR 2022 Second-Quarter Highlights: Earnings per common share (EPS) for the quarter were $0.35, an increase of $0.06 from the prior quarter. Excluding $0.01 per common share after-tax of Notable Items, adjusted earnings per common share were $0.36.

title: Why Wedbush Is Pumping the Brakes on Huntington Bancshares, Keycorp and Other Financial Stocks
text: A long holiday weekend did not slow markets from their search for the bottom, as Monday saw stocks retreat further into the red.

title: JPMorgan Chase downgrades three regional banks
text: JPMorgan Chase & Co. analysts on Friday downgraded three regional bank stocks and said they're moving their outlook for the sector to neutral based on rising expectations of a recession as well as more aggressive interest rate hikes from the U.S. Federal Reserve. JPMorgan cut its ratings on Live Oak Bancshares Inc. LOB, -0.35% and Huntington Bancshares Inc. HBAN, -1.72% to neutral from overweight and downgraded HBT Financial Inc. HBT, +0.85% to underweight from neutral.
